item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine's Ground Robots Revolutionizing Modern Warfare
item.description: Ukrainian forces are deploying robotic ground systems that are reshaping battlefield tactics, showcasing how land-based autonomous systems can adapt to changing combat conditions in real time.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Deploys Warships for Pacific Combat Drills Amid Japan Tensions
item.description: Beijing stages naval exercises in the western Pacific as territorial disputes with Japan escalate, highlighting intensifying military competition in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: 🥶 China's Arctic Ambitions Bolster Russia's Geopolitical Leverage
item.description: As Beijing pursues polar infrastructure and shipping routes, Moscow gains a strategic partner in the Arctic, potentially reshaping the balance of power in the far north as Western sanctions isolate Russia.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Leaders Debate NATO-Style Common Defense Clause
item.description: European Union member states are considering a mutual defense provision similar to NATO's Article 5, as questions mount about US commitment to European security under the Trump administration.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany's Merz Loses Favor With Trump After Iran War Criticism
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has drawn Trump's ire by questioning US strategy in the Iran conflict, jeopardizing Berlin's efforts to rebuild transatlantic ties and potentially accelerating US troop drawdowns in Germany.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Seeks Clarity from US on Russian Ceasefire Proposal
item.description: Ukraine will ask the Trump administration for details on a Russian proposal for a brief ceasefire next week, as Zelenskiy seeks to understand the terms before committing to any pause in fighting.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 Trump Open to Pulling US Troops from Italy and Spain
item.description: President Trump said "probably" when asked about withdrawing troops from Italy and Spain, one day after announcing a review of US force levels in Germany, escalating tensions with NATO allies over the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇮🇹 Italy Condemns Israeli Interception of Gaza Aid Flotilla
item.description: Italy condemned Israel seizure of aid ships bound for Gaza and demanded the release of Italians "unlawfully detained," marking another diplomatic flashpoint over humanitarian access to the besieged territory.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Army Chief Orders Two-Month Limit for Frontline Troops
item.description: Ukraine top general ordered a mandatory two-month limit for troops in forward positions after photos of emaciated soldiers sparked national outcry over the grueling conditions faced by forces fighting Russia.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Retreats After Hitting Four-Year High on Iran War Fears
item.description: Global oil prices eased after briefly topping $126 per barrel, a four-year high, as traders weighed the risk of prolonged disruption from the US-Iran conflict and its impact on the global economy.

item.title: ⚽ FIFA Chief Confirms Iran Will Play World Cup Matches in US Despite War
item.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino confirmed Iran will participate in the 2026 World Cup and play matches in the United States, addressing concerns amid the ongoing US-Iran conflict. The Iranian delegation was notably absent from the FIFA Congress.

item.title: 💰 US Inflation Gauge Jumps to 3-Year High as Iran War Drives Gas Prices
item.description: A key inflation measure surged in March as gasoline prices soared due to the Iran conflict and Strait of Hormuz blockade, marking the highest level in three years and signaling economic pressure from the ongoing war.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Trump Administration Reviews Possible Troop Reduction in Germany
item.description: President Trump said his administration is considering reducing US troop levels in Germany, criticizing Berlin for not contributing naval forces to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz during the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🏛️ Federal Reserve Faces Leadership Shake-Up as Warsh Enters, Powell Stays
item.description: President Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve, Kevin Warsh, has called for "regime change" at the central bank, while Jerome Powell will remain on the board as a governor after stepping down as chair.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Votes to End 76-Day Partial Government Shutdown
item.description: Lawmakers approved funding for the Department of Homeland Security, ending the longest shutdown in the agency's history that had caused major disruptions at US airports.

item.title: 🇬🇧⚠️ UK Terrorism Threat Level Raised to 'Severe' After London Stabbings
item.description: Britain raised its terrorism threat level after a stabbing attack on two Jewish men in London, with the chief rabbi warning that 'visibly Jewish' people are 'not safe' in the country.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Zelenskyy Seeks Details of Putin's May 9 Ceasefire Proposal
item.description: Ukraine's president is clarifying Russia's proposed Victory Day ceasefire as Russian drone attacks kill one in Dnipro and wound dozens in Odesa, while Ukraine strikes refineries deep inside Russia.

item.title: 🚀 US CENTCOM requests Dark Eagle hypersonic missile deployment for possible use against Iran
item.description: US Central Command has asked for the long-delayed hypersonic missile to be sent to the Middle East for potential use in the Iran conflict, marking a significant escalation in military readiness.

item.title: 🛢️ UAE leaves OPEC as Trump and Fox News celebrate decision
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has departed the oil cartel, with Trump praising the move. The decision could reshape global oil markets and reduce Saudi influence over UAE energy policy.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and EU back international commission on Russia war reparations
item.description: Both the Ukrainian and European Parliaments voted to support the International Claims Commission, a body designed to process claims for damages caused by Russia's invasion.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Romania gains access to US counter-drone marketplace
item.description: Romania will now be able to acquire counter-UAS technology through the US counter-drone marketplace, expanding allied defense capabilities against aerial threats.

item.title: 🏛️ Hegseth Clashes With Democrats in Second Day of Congress Hearings
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced sharp questioning over the Iran war's costs, civilian casualties, and lack of congressional authorization as the 60-day War Powers deadline looms.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran War Deadline Arrives With No End in Sight
item.description: President Trump faces a Friday deadline to end the Iran war or seek congressional extension, but the conflict remains in a standoff over shipping routes as the Strait of Hormuz stays closed and oil prices surge.

item.title: 🇨🇩 US imposes sanctions on former Congo President Joseph Kabila
item.description: The US Treasury Department sanctioned former DRC President Joseph Kabila, citing corruption and human rights abuses during his 18-year rule.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇻🇪 First US-Venezuela commercial flight lands in Caracas after 7 years
item.description: American Airlines flight AA3599 arrived in Caracas, marking the first direct commercial flight between the US and Venezuela since Homeland Security suspended service in 2019.
